item.title: Bangladesh rushes to secure $2 billion loan amid energy crisis. [ thehindu ]
item.description:
[Priority]

Systemic Significance

Selected by: Kimi-K2-Instruct, Mistral-Small, Gemini-2.5-Flash-Lite, GPT-OSS-120B

Bangladesh — which imports 95% of its oil and gas needs — has not raised electricity and fuel prices despite the global surge
